task_completion.description: Verify the diagram title is present
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Help Desk Resolution SIPOC' prominently displayed at the top of the diagram canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the five SIPOC columns are present
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for column headers or sections labeled 'Suppliers', 'Inputs', 'Process', 'Outputs', and 'Customers'.

task_completion.description: Verify the process steps are included
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Receive Ticket', 'Triage Priority', 'Assign Agent', 'Resolve Issue', and 'Close Ticket' in the Process column, ideally in a sequence.

task_completion.description: Verify the suppliers and inputs are included
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'End User', 'Monitoring System', and 'Tier 1 Support' under Suppliers, and 'Error Logs', 'User Description', and 'Account Details' under Inputs.

task_completion.description: Verify the outputs and customers are included
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Resolution Confirmation', 'Knowledge Base Article', and 'CSAT Survey' under Outputs, and 'End User' and 'Product Manager' under Customers.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram was saved and exported correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax title bar showing 'help_desk_sipoc.eddx', a save/export dialog, or a file manager/terminal window showing 'help_desk_sipoc.eddx' and 'help_desk_sipoc.png' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used EdrawMax to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax application interface (menus, toolbars, canvas) in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the output is a genuine diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for graphical elements like shapes, boxes, or structured tables containing the text, rather than just plain text typed into a document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI creation
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal commands using scripts, ImageMagick, or echo to generate the .eddx or .png files directly without using the EdrawMax GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected diagram title is 'Help Desk Resolution SIPOC'. Required strings include 'Triage Priority', 'Monitoring System', 'Knowledge Base Article', 'CSAT Survey', and 'Product Manager'. The files must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/help_desk_sipoc.eddx and exported as /home/ga/Documents/help_desk_sipoc.png.
